case_title: KAJ EDHOLM VS. HOGAN SUNG et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNG, HOGAN

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT HOGAN SUNG'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. HOGAN SUNG HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-20-2007 - AS PER FILED NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-25-2007 - AS PER NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED IN THIS CASE.
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ANSWER PREVIOUSLY STRICKEN. THERE ARE NO OTHER DOCUMENTS TO STRIKE.
